name: cursor-headless
description: Delegate to Cursor Agent from Codex via thin MCP tools (ask/plan/implement) wrapping a fast headless CLI path. Includes /cursor-implement-workflow and /cursor-review-loop.

interface.shortDescription: Native Cursor ask/plan/implement tools for Codex
interface.longDescription: Thin MCP facade over cursor-agent --print. cursor_ask/plan default to cursor-grok-4.5-high; cursor_implement defaults to composer-2.5 — Codex picks Grok low/medium/high and whether to use Fast.
defaultPrompt: Use cursor_ask with Grok 4.5 low/medium/high (opt into Fast) by complexity.
Use cursor_plan with Grok 4.5 low/medium/high (opt into Fast) by complexity.
Use cursor_implement with composer-2.5 (opt into Fast) or Grok 4.5 low/medium/high by complexity.
Use /cursor-implement-workflow to fan out parallel Cursor workers from Codex.
Use /cursor-review-loop for Codex review → Cursor fix → Codex re-review until clean.
